On Sun, 23 Sep 2012 22:32:44 +0400
Andrej Zverev <az@sunner.semmy.ru> wrote:

> Hello.
> 
> You can find this version on BACKPAN if you really need it. So you can just add 
> MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=     CPAN:ALLENDAY and it will be fetched.
> 
> Actually and if you really need this port and using it - this  good try to save port, but if not, 
> I prefer allow port die via expiration.

Thanks i have added this. 

PKGNAMEPREFIX=  p5-
MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=     CPAN:ALLENDAY

Ok delete then this Port if you wish.
